item.title: Changeling
item.description:
Infobox Changelings are a titanborn race of humanoids from one of Mytharia's moons, Nokk. Their ancestry, and the magical radiation present on Nokk have caused their physiology to be malleable allowing them to shapeshift. All changelings are born with near the exact same appearance, but possess the ability to change it and a large amount of their physiology at will.A changelings natural form is an androgynous bipedal humanoid with pale white skin. They have two arms and are bald. In their natural form, changelings do not possess genitals. Most changelings are born lucent with pointed ears in this form, but even those born aphotic can use their transformation abilities to appear as if they have pointed ears or vice versa. A changelings natural form doesn't matter however, as each changeling creates their own form(s) over the course of their lifetime.At will, a changeling can manipulate their body changing parts of its shape, its colour, giving themselves hair, or changing parts of their anatomy. Everything except the basic structure of their body, IE, the amount of limbs, essential organs, and whether they have blood or not can be changed cosmetically.Reproduction is handled primarily in one of two ways. As changelings are a titanborn race, either their titan births more, or changelings give themselves genitalia and reproduce sexually. Other alternatives are possible but less common. Wild magic has been known on occasion to manifest changelings, or transform people and objects into them.
Changelings are known practitioners of eugenics. On occasion changelings will be born with defects of some kind, extra limbs, a serpents tail instead of legs, etc. If the Lunar Conclave can find a use for changelings with these defects, they are allowed a place in society, if not, they are exiled, sent to be experimented on, or killed. Other than that, the place of genetics are not of much consequence to changelings. They all appear nearly the same, and when a child is born its genetics are seemingly randomised. Changelings still hold the cultural ideals of families and those they are raised by and related to, but genetics don't seem to be something that is passed on.Another benefit of changelings transformation abilities, is that they can manipulate their bone marrow and change their blood type at will. This often makes them sought after in medical fields outside of Nokk, and in adventuring parties with a lot of racial disparity because they are universal blood donors.
At times, changelings will use magic to lock their form and live among other races as one of them. during that time their physiology will continually adapt to try and become more and more like the members of that race around them. This can sometimes allow a changeling to eventually figure out how to adapt more difficult parts of a creatures anatomy. Most of the time, a changeling cannot adapt a jade troll's regenerative abilities, or a siren's song, but if they spend enough time in a single form and among others of the race they're mimicking, they can eventually learn to give themselves these pieces of anatomy. This can even in cases allow a changeling to adapt their lifespan to the lifespan of the other race. Typically transformation lock is only used on replacement children however.
Changelings came into being before The Shattering and when it occurred were shunted into The Feywild and onto The Feywild's version of the moon of Nokk. There, their civilisation flourished, with their largest cities being lead each primarily by one of the titans that birthed them. The high abundance of mana on the fae moon allowed them to build a highly advanced civilisation based on magic.Eventually, the changeling society found that its knowledge of the world had plateaued, and they needed to find out more. So they used the power of the titans that spawned them to pierce the veil between worlds, and devised a process to lock newborn changelings into a single form and replace the children of other races, in other worlds.As time went on, changelings would send out more and more spies, and find ways to encode memories in the changeling to unlock when they came of age. This allowed them to immerse themselves and grow up in a culture, before learning about their changeling heritage. When a changeling sleeper agent came of age, the encoded memories would awaken and tell them what they are, who their birth parents were and their jobs, what their birth name was, a small amount of information on where they were born, and what their mission was for why they were sent to replace a child somewhere. The details of these missions varied, they could be as simple as learning about the culture and reporting back, or as complicated as destabilising the nation and pursuing specific political ends if they had replaced a future king. The lives of the taken children varied. in some cases they would be raised by the changeling parents as a form of perceived cultural exchange. In some cases, the children may also be taken to perform experiments on, to learn about the limits and capabilities of their physiology.
The lives of these changelings adopted into other races could vary. Many changelings would go their entire lives undetected. In many cases their quality of life was poor due to not having the physiological abilities of these races, such as a dragonborn's breath sac, or the ability to trance like an elf. And of course in some cases even if their forms didn't look like they were lucent, changelings were burned upon presenting other signs of being lucent in anti-magic societies.
When The Planaclysm occurred, changelings were shunted onto Mytharia's moon of Nokk. Many of their cities were destroyed including massive pieces of their archives. Much of their knowledge was lost and much of their political landscape was turned over and destabilised with different powers taking control of their society. The replacement of children in Mytharia became more common as the Lunar Conclave, the ruling council of changeling society, sought to replace the knowledge they had lost and to shape the world how they wished.In changeling society, they are born without gender and usually choose it for themselves as they age and find their preferences. Genderfluidity is also common in changeling culture, choosing to adopt different genders or forms based on circumstance, like night and day, or months of the year, or simply on a whim.Changelings are primarily believed to have come into being originally from a species of plant titan that bore them as fruit. Some believe changelings were manifested from the magic of Nokk itself bringing them into existence.

item.title: Ginny Stitch
item.description: Infobox Ginny Stitch is a seamstress from Sparksville. He has been sewing most of her life and especially has a passion for pillows. She started dating Johnny Razor several years ago after the two met at a library.Ginny is a seamstress. She's a little bit of a bitch, but he really enjoys his job and making sure people rest comfortably.Her and Johnny are very close. They've been dating a little over a year now. He doesn't like Johnny's obsession with Silver Lawson, but doesn't want to get in the way of his hobbies. She wants Johnny to find a job soon and doesn't like that he's currently supporting the both of them, especially with the concert tickets he just bought with the last of the money he had saved from his last job.GInny doesn't like The Volt King, but also he just sees The Volt King's reign as the way of the world. The Volt King is their god and he's the one who ushered them into the modernity and convenience they have today. Yeah, the monthly tithe isn't fun, the aggressive military isn't fun, but not having to fear monsters and having modern technology are tradeoffs.

item.title: Renexann
item.description: Infobox Location Overview

item.title: Paw-In Shop
item.description: Infobox An old shop run by the siamese cat, Catamari**“you see an old metal sign on a pole sticking from the ground that reads “The Paw-In Shop” with purple text on grey metal. next to the name Is a pawprint. the sign points down a staircase in a small building.”“you enter an average sized shop with walls lined by shelves of trinkets and knick knacks. only a few of them seem to have blood on them as you glance over these fanciful wares. in a wooden basement with a fair few items displayed on cushions or slightly horrifying mannequins with too-real faces. behind the front desk sits a cat licking it's paw as you come in, and behind the cat potion shelf with a spare spattering of availabilitiecatamsri experimented on by wizard Who wanted to invite them with intelligence of squid spirit like mahi’s.**

item.title: Gryton's Grill

item.title: Drop it Like It's Cold
item.description: Infobox An Ice cream shop run by Scoop DoggAdventurers from all around Renexann and Rextaulia gather here to discuss quests and meetup for planning and adventuring. The Action Heroes specifically always stop here in celebration after a successful quest. Scoop Dogg's most famous flavour is the chocolate double scoop.they have their own font called scoop scoop pawnbig red dog house
item.guid: Mytharia/Planets/Mytharia Planet/Rextaulia/Renexann/Drop it Like It's Cold.md

item.title: Lemon
item.description: Infobox Lemon is a lightning oni who was abandoned as a child and bought by Catamari then raised as a pseudo-daughter/slave alongside Terra. she later adopted a red dragon wyrmling.

item.title: Nick Name
item.description: Infobox Nick Name is a man with an anomalous ability to give newborn children the perfect names, and works a full doctor's salary. he has worked across several different hospitals across the world naming children. his names are like an artform to him and the public. Being named by Nick can be seen as an honour for those who knows. The first name he gave was to himself when he himself was born.

item.title: Florian of Greenest
item.description:
Infobox art by bialbovi
Florian is a former soldier of the greenest empire, turned spy for grognak who was later executed for his crimes before rising as a Martyr of Karamy. Upon rising he aided in the attempt to uncover the conspiracy surrounding the missing Millicent of Frostont and other spirits who had been disappearing from the streets of New Dougleton. Upon forming The Chaos Crew with his allies at the end of this quest, they ended up taking to the seas so they could search for The Fang of The Abyss in hopes to prevent the aquatic calamity set to befall The Divergent Isles.Florian is a pessimistic leaning soldier. He says what he thinks when he can allow himself too without speaking in riddles, but he's still more guarded on his past and the things that he regrets in life. He has some anger issues, but the anger is most often internalised and directed at himself. He's selfless, but because he doesn't care about what happens to him thinking that anything which befalls him is just what he deserves for the things that he has done. Florian is a former soldier of The Greenest Empire. Even before the war he came from a patriotic family with his parents looking fondly toward the military of Greenest and encouraging him to enlist once the drafting started before the war with Grognak. His siblings, Soren, and Seraphina, sought to avoid their parents and their patriotism, but while Florian was still there he still believed.Once the drafts began and Florian was drafted into the military, during training he met Renata as the two clicked and became fast friends. However, they didn't discuss the politics of the war nor the grim events which surrounded their lives. Florian also continued to talk with his sister even once the war began. She could tell he was deeply brainwashed and she slowly tried to talk him out of it without outing herself as being against the empire.In the battlegrounds, Florian was placed as a scout to watch for enemies or to check out the surrounding areas for strategic positioning. Him and Renata didn't see each other again after training, seemingly never in the same squads or parties. until one day Florian was on the battlefield fighting against a party of Grognak soldiers. He fought and as he struck down a Grognak solider he didn't see who it really was, that it was Renata, until the blow had been struck and she was on the ground horribly injurred. Paralysed in the wake of his actions, with the battle not going well, and his party losing to those from the Grognak party, Florian felt like he could die now and that it would be what he deserved. He stood there, blank, his party had to drag him from the battlefield in retreat so that he would not be killed.
Upon his later death at war, the God Karamy, The False Sufferer was impressed by his suffering and chose to raise his soul as a spirit and place it into the greatsword he once wielded so he might rise and become a great martyr to fated death more spectacular and tragic than the one that had already befallen him.
His ascent from the sword however, was put on hold, as the spirit binder, Jean-Guy of Wingspan was travelling to Greenest City and happened to hear about the anomaly of the sword that had changed. And so, he purchased it from the military and brought it back to New Dougleton for study among the many other artifacts and bound spirits which he kept.Then from there, eventually when the group who would become known as The Chaos Crew was raiding Jean Guy's office, Florian's vampiric sword fell to the ground and it jostled him awake and out of the sword. He was now, Karamy's martyr, and it was time for him to fight again so it seemed.During the early days of the war, Seraphina, Florian's older sister kept in contact with him through the patriotism and she still tried to talk with him seeing how brainwashed he was to the cause. She slowly tried to get him out of that mess as she dodged the draft to war herself, and while trying to avoid getting outed for her beliefs against the empire.

item.title: The Wayfarer's Pack
item.description: Infobox The Wayfarer's Pack is an organisation focused on wanderlust and adventure. They are a widespread guild of adventurers and monster hunters with the guilds primary base in Grognak.

item.title: Pharos
item.description: Infobox Pharos' are a rare form of lucent beings who possess the capability to manifest and exteralise their soul as a spirit that represents them as their prime concept. These spirits can possess a myriad of abilities depending on those who manifest them.Pharos' are the counterpart to Lodestars. Where a lodestar externalises their soul via the crystalisation of it and forging it into an emblem, a Pharos externalises it through manifesting it as a spirit called a shadow bitch with abilities that represent the personality and goals of the individual.These shadow bitches then take on appearances that are all wildly different and as well A pharos' shadow bitch may have useful abilities, such as splitting the energy of a spell between the pharos and another, or making the heads of all those who gaze upon it explode. But they could also have useless abilities like being able to topdeck the card you need to win a card game, or changing the flavour of water into wine.The abilities of pharos' potential shadow bitches are wildly unpredictable and could be anything one could imagine. These abilities can also change and grow with the person who controls them as they get older. A shadow bitch might be useless when it first manifests and then gain further abilities as the pharos becomes more powerful and finds who they are as an individual.

item.title: Lodestar
item.description: Infobox Lodestars are a rare form of lucent beings whose sparks and souls possess the capability of crystalising physically into crystals and gems. These gems are then used to forge powerful items that only their lodestar can use to their fullest potential.Lodestars are the counterpart to Pharos'. A pharos externalises their soul and their spark through the manifestation of an incorporeal spirit which represents them. The abilities of said spirit might or might not be useful to the one who uses them. A Lodestar however, externalises their soul and their spark by wholly crystalising it outside their body into a gem. This gem which houses the essence of a lodestar's very being can be fashioned into a powerful item which allows the lodestar to transform and unleash their true power. But before one can do that, they must fashion their emblem.The creation of an emblem can be an arduous process, but once complete the emblem is usually a small item worn by the lodestar, it could be earings, a necklace, a ring, or a myriad of other accessories. If a lodestar is departed from their emblem, the gem that makes up their soul, they will experience animaleipis.An emblem, once created has a command word or phrase to activate or deactivate its power. While active an emblem grants its lodestar an attire fashioned from within, as well as a powerful weapon forged of the soul.Once a lodestar is fully awakened and their emblem forged, in some cases spirits can be bound to the emblem, granting their power whenever their emblem is active and the spirit is temporarily absorbed inside.The abilities that are granted by a Lodestar's emblem are as varied as the abilities granted by a Pharos' shadow bitch but they all have two things in common.When a lodestar's emblem is active, it grants them a unique attire, it could be armour, it could be a suit, it could be a robe, and it might change overtime with the person as they gain mastery over their emblem.The second is a weapon. Sometimes this is as literal as a greatsword, or a bow, but other times it could also be a deck of cards or a yo-yo. This weapon is typically embedded with a large piece of the gem that makes up their emblemBeyond this, the abilities granted by a lodestar's emblem vary as much as the lodestars who bare them. One might grant the ability to stop time, while another might grant the power of creation, or simply the ability to top-deck whatever card needed to win in a card game. It all depends on the souls and intentions of the lodestar and what guides them.The first lodestar was recorded shortly after the shattering. all records have been lost as to who they were or what power they possessed beyond fragments of records that show an ornate crystaline yo-yo.From there, lodestars have been a scarce but consistant occurance across mytharia. Often powerful leaders meant to protect the world, but in some cases also powerful villains bent on destruction.It is believed a lodestars purpose is to lead with their soul, to let their soul be the star that guides those around them toward a better tomorrow. But what that better tomorrow looks like can be highly contested. Lodestars are often destined to congregate and fight for common causes, or to fight rivals with conflicting goals. They often guide the course of history with these conflicts and the resolutions that follow.

item.title: Malphas
item.description: Infobox Malphas' are a form of devil born from the corruption of different bird spirits such as harpies. They represent the concept of The Tower, constructing fortresses and knocking down those of others. They are birds made of shadows known to be able to meld into them and form grand creations from within the darkness around them.They take the form of bipedal birds with arms and wings and multiple feathered tails. their wings are usually partially skeletal as black feathers extend off them. They have slender beaks filled with teeth. They possess bird legs with sharp talons and dexterous hands on slender arms

item.title: Malevolent Spirits
item.description: Infobox Malevolent spirits are spirits corrupted away from the concept they initially represented and turned toward violence and torture in the pursuit of power. Malevolent spirits can take many forms but are by in large divided into two categories, Devils, and Demons. Devils are malevolent spirits that possess sapience, while Demons act purely on the emotion of violence and their prime concept.Malevolent Spirits possess a wide array of appearances but are prone to jagged tusks or teeth and claws, dark and desaturated colours. They typically look like gloom world corrupted variants of other spirits.Some Devils and Demons retain the ability to reproduce through means similar to their original forms. breaking off pieces of their essence to manifest smaller spirits, or even reproducing sexually. Tieflings are the result of many devils and demons parlaying with mortals.It is theorised the first malevolent spirit rose during the age of dawn when some spirits first began to deny their prime concepts and orders from the gods that created them. These spirits were cast down and began the first devils and demons.

item.title: Vulpalf
item.description: Infobox Vulpalf's are a race of people from a starfaring empire at war with the Begacahkos and Saiyans. They are a proud people focused on the creation of better and better technology and cataloguing the lore of the universe as they force way for their own stories.Vulpalf are bipedal humanoids with mostly humanoid proportions. They possess tails and ears remininscent of foxes as well as fur along their arms and legs. They also possess fox-like noses and the beginnings of snouts with sharp teeth. Vulpalf bodies are typically physically strong allowing for the ability to life heavy weights. They posess a breath sac within their throats which allows them to channel cold and emit a breath of frost that removes energy from their surroundings. They also possess the ability to channel this through their veins and out small organic vents on the undersides of their wrists.Vulpalfs are also gifted with powerful energy that strengthens their minds making it much easier for them to maintain focus and to resist psychic influence and attacks.

item.title: Birdfolk
item.description: Infobox Race overview

item.title: The Fire Fighter
item.description:
Infobox “Niles Jr.jpg” could not be found. Art by SmackerOOOn The Fire Fighter is a famous member of The Action Heroes and a clone of the adventurer Niles Norales created by the mage Igor. The Fire Fighter was then named Niles after the man he was cloned from, and both raised and trained by the previous Fire Fighter Belleryl Boldsong. After her death he took up the mantle in her honour.
The Fire Fighter is a well-known member of The Action Heroes and a clone of the adventurer Niles Norales created by the mage Igor, famous for his complex cloning process that has seen the creation of hundreds of clones of himself. This Fire Fighter who would be named Niles after the man he was cloned from, would go on to be raised and trained by a Dwarven woman. Belleryl Boldsong. Belleryl was the previous Fire Fighter. She forged and enchanted the Fire Fighter Gauntlets with with the fire of a dragon's breath. When Niles was 16 she gave her life to protect the secrets of his origins, killing a villain who knew the secret but collapsing the building on top of them. All that was found intact after was her flaming gauntlets which Niles inherited to take up the mantle of The Fire Fighter.
Niles has a high sense of morality and what he finds to be right and wrong. He fights for what he believes to be right and fights against what he believes to be wrong. However, due to being a member of The Action Heroes, Niles has an inflated sense of ego towards his judgement. This can cause him to be rude and brash towards those he finds annoying, believing he is above them.
A trait that most of The Action Heroes share, is a violent abhorrence from killing others. Niles is prone to debating the morality of this, and placing himself above others for this belief. He believes his refusal to kill makes him better than adventurers who consistently kill their targets.
Niles was created as a clone commissioned by Mick Graves from the mage Igor, a man with a murky reputation but known for his godlike cloning capabilities. Igor cloned Niles from a sample of blood from the famous adventurer Niles Norales, and he was paid a hefty sum by Mick Graves.
Afterwards, Niles was put into the care of the at the time Fire Fighter, Belleryl Boldsong. Only the Mick, Igor, and Belleryl knowing Niles' true origins. Belleryl would go on to raise and train him like he was her own son. She taught him how to fight, how to enchant, and especially how to wield her own gauntlets planning to make him a set of his own someday.
When Niles was 16 a villain was able to find out about his origins which caused Mick Graves to dispatch Belleryl to deal with them before Niles' origins could be revealed. She cornered the villain in an abandoned building on the 4th layer of Renexann. they tried to make a deal but a fight ensued and Belleryl collapsed the building on top of them. All that was found intact in the wreckage was her flaming gauntlets. Niles took those gauntlets and reforged them so they'd fit him before taking up the mantle of The Fire Fighter.
In the wake of Niles Norales' disappearance in Hillsville in the Oktober of 1017 ME, The Action Heroes believed that he had perished, and sent their Niles into the spotlight revealing his identity as a publicity stunt to raise faith in them as Renexann's protectors. This worked for a time, until Niles Norales and the other Outsiders returned from their journey to Volteya. Shortly after their arrival in Renexann the party learned of Niles' existence and happened to run into him when visiting Drop it Like It's Cold. Their meeting was tense until Cal MeowMeow attacked a group of Titan Blood users causing a massive battle on the street. The Fire Fighter joined into the fight and attempted to take down the dangerous criminals, but took too long as the battle resulted in over 30 civillian casualties. Eventually The Outsiders and The Fire Fighter aided by The Tickle Troupe managed to subdue their attackers and Gloom Spider and The Damnator arrived too late to help. The Action Heroes took The Outsiders back to Action Heroes Stronghold and The Fire Fighter explained his situation to them.

item.title: Andy 'Zuliani' Zuliani
item.description:
Infobox
Andy 'Zuliani' Zuliani is a waiter at the Two Heels Diner in Zappingham. He was originally born in Fulmin and grew up there before moving around to earn his degrees. He did a bachelors in fashion in Fulmin before doing a masters degree in shoe design in Sparkopolis. However Andy has struggled to find a career with his degrees and has ended up working at as a waiter.
Andy is a pretty laid back guy who just wants to get through his day to day at the diner so he can go home to further his personal work. He's driven to succeed in his creative work but is continually finding it hard to continue and find opportunities for these endeavours under the reign of The Volt King.
In 1970 AVK, Andy was born to an average suburban family in Fulmin and grew up there throughout most of his early life. During his teenage years he became exposed to the world of fashion and particularly the intricacies of heels and the culture around them. This sparked a lifelong passion as when he graduated high school he moved on to attend Sparkfire University to complete a bachelors in fashion design.During his years at Sparkfire University is also when he realised the art world chafes a lot under the rule of the volt king and decided to take burger flipping and restaurant waitering as electives so he'd have skills to fall back on.
After his stint at Sparkfire University, Andy went on to do a masters degree in shoe design in Sparkopolis, minoring in fashion politics. It was during this time that Andy became active in the underground art world of protest and propaganda against The Volt King. He attended many secret events and protests, as well as a lot of parties while he was in the midst of his degree.
However, once his masters was complete Andy became loosely involved with an organisation known as The Cloudbreakers. He designed the shoes for their outfits and composed their theme song. But when most of The Cloudbreakers were killed by the wrath of The Volt King and the efforts of Volt Action during the failed Operation Cloudfall, he decided that for now he just wants to get through the day and hung up shoemaking falling back onto becoming waiter and getting a job at a small diner outside Sparkopolis called the Wayfarer's Lighthouse.
Andy was working at the diner one evening when Two Wordz came in shortly after meeting Wyenne Belswanna Coochiggly Murdendrum, rescuing her from her abusive stepmother, and fighting a kraken. The band was being served by Andy with Goojoo even ordering his favourite, the Ruben, when the diner was attacked by a jellyfish-like titan. This titan had been there for Wyenne's locket which the group was going to give to them until one of their members, Trevor, leapt through a portal the titan created last minute to make sure it didn't steal the locket.
After this terrifying attack on the diner, he quickly quit his job and decided it was time to move. He moved continents, going so far as to move all the way to Zappingham where he got a job at the Two Heels Diner.
His uneventful work was however interrupted a few months later when The Outsiders met Two Wordz at this diner and were attacked by Viles Vorals of Volt Action for their crimes against the fulminated crown. As this battle occurred instead of hiding, Andy ran to get out of there as soon as possible.

item.title: High Heel Andy
Welcome
item.description: Welcome to Mytharia!Mytharia is a world about legacy, a world about connection, and a world about how people shape this world. Mytharia is a fantasy setting, with some sci-fi elements to it. Further genres depend on the exact stories told within.Mytharia is also a setting that is meant to explore the effects of these fantasy elements, monsters and magic, the occult and the profane, on a world and on different societies within it. It is a setting about exploring the limits of the implications of events and things.So anyway, go off an explore the wiki, hopefully you enjoy!

item.title: Coolio D. Coolington
item.description:
Infobox Coolio D. Coolington is a senior high school student at Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy. He began his quest as a lonely teen with no friends who sat alone in taverns everyday hoping that someone would talk with him and possibly take him on an adventure. (what a loser... yet so cool!)Coolio eventually achieved this wish and formed the 3CDS which later got rebranded to The Outsiders. Since then he has become the most powerful of them by far as his latent potential has continued to bloom since he came out of his shell and began to unlock it.Coolio is a naïve character who wants to do good in the world and wants to change the world for the better. He wants to be able to protect everyone and save everyone no matter the cost.Coolio began as a shy kid but has grown more into himself as a capable adventurer. He's still shy, he's still a kid, but he's also more sure of his abilities and especially of his own parties capabilities now. He is naïve and wants to see the good in the world and change it for the better, and he wants to protect everyone and save everyone no matter the cost. But as he's been adventuring he's been faced with not being able to save everyone, and been faced with having to kill, to end life. Adventure has changed Coolio Coolington as it changes everyone.Coolio grew up in a family of 13 siblings with each one being born in a different month. Coolio is the middle child. His family is a noble one revered in his town, Coolsville, for their saviour during The Planaclysm when the crops were dying and the Coolington's managed to revitalise them.As a child he grew up with an appreciate for magic and a drive to adventure and protect people. He spent much time in the wilderness with his sister Barna who went on to become a druid. During their childhood Barna taught Coolio a fair amount about magic while he also practiced his swordplay.Once he became old enough, he moved to Goldas to attend Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy as a high school wizard student. During his time there he lived in dorms, returning home during holidays to visit his family.As his final year of high school came around, the senior year adventuring project was doled out. A project to simply to go on a small adventure. Raid one tier 1.5 or above dungeon, slay one tier 2 or above monster, assassinate a political leader, forge or enchant a rare or better magic item. Do any of these things simply to prove to the school that you're ready to graduate and go out into the world and adventure for yourself. Students are given 1 school year to prepare themselves and complete this task and are encouraged to take on this challenge alongside other classmates, forming their first adventuring parties so they share their skills and adventure together.
Coolio was a shy kid who had no friends so for his first 2 months of the project he sat alone in taverns hoping someone will talk to him and possibly take him on an adventure, but each day failing to initiate a conversation with anyone, until The Outsiders.Coolio's Shadow Bitch allows him to command it to hug a creature within 20 feet twice per day and twin a spell he's casting on himself to another creature. Graduate Adventuring Academy and become someone great Cure his grandmothers unknown cancer The Coolington Family Sir Antoine A. Adventure's Adventuring Academy The dead god Tiamat His great great grandfather lives and prowls the coast of the north pole cataloguing what he can find.

item.title: Alberich Ichas
item.description:
Infobox An eternal sinner damned by a deal with a devil left to wander the world aimless in what to do with an immortal life, without his wife.Alberich Ichas, The Eternal Sinner is a controversial figure in Mytharian history. Some see him as a martyr, and others see him as a wicked villain, an eternal sinner. Some argue he has good intentions for what he's done, and others argue he's trying to look like a good person while being a villain in history. Scholars will likely never reach a consensus on this topic.Perception of Alberich's personality is divisive and is most commonly looked at in one of two ways.In one view, Alberich is a tragic martyr, not the type chosen by a god or other being for a tragic death, but just someone who suffers for their cause. Some view him as someone who was once a good person pushed into horrible situations to commit terrible acts to do what he thinks is right. Scholars who believe this view see him as a depressed man who has trouble letting go of the past because it's all he's ever known.A secondary view, shows Alberich as a monster, a villain. In some circles he is seen as a man who believes he's a good person but wants to put up a facade of thinking he is a bad person when in reality he is one. This view states that he is a man obsessed with the past incapable of moving on, someone who refuses to change even with a thousand years of opportunities, and a thousand years of blood on his hands. This view states that he is a man obsessed with legacy who wants to be seen as a tragic hero, a tragic martyr, someone who would go so far as to kill witnesses that would tell stories different from what he wants.
Alberich was born to a military house in Resanthum, House Ichas. He grew up training to join the military as a medic and eventually did when he came of age to because his father, Vishnyakov Ichas, was a renowned general in Resanthum's military. Eventually when he was in the woods he met a woman named Neveah Ravana. She was a member of a powerful witches coven hidden in the mountains of Resanthum. The two eventually became close, despite the danger of Alberich colluding with a witch due to the laws of Resanthum that all witches be burned if their magic doesn't come from The Golden Phoenix. His family was not happy with this development but Alberich continued to see her and eventually was disowned by his family for it. The two eventually married when Alberich was 26.
Nuka Cola, "Human Alberich", 2024Alberich and Neveah would go on to sire a child together, but due to the danger of Neveah being a witch within her coven in a country that burns those born lucent, they chose to give up the child for adoption. The two later would attempt to have another child but it would die shortly after birth.
On Alberich's 35th birthday in 842 FA, after not hearing from his father for nearly 10 years, Vishnyakov came to visit him. Surprisingly, it wasn't to fight him, but as a cry for help. He had become incredibly sick and was asking if Neveah had any dark magic which could heal him. Alberich protested, he didn't want to help his father, but Neveah convinced him that they should help. She had been studying ancient magic and had spent years shaping them into a dark spell, something that seemed to have the power to grant strength, to heal, perchance to bring back the dead. It had seemed to emerge from the shadows to her, and she used it to save Alberich's father from the sickness that plagued him. This spell would later become known as Devoid of Life.
Devoid of Life, was not a spell without consequence, it was a spell that fed on the soul for the power it granted. Whether it be the soul of the caster, or other souls with which they had access too. It damaged her soul which in turn took its toll on her body. She didn't realise the price at first and tried to hide it from Alberich because she didn't want him to hurt himself. But 6 years later she began the crawl into death. She became bedridden for the last of her days, and Alberich as an experienced doctor couldn't figure out what was plaguing his wife or how to save her. And eventually she died. She left behind her spellbook with the secrets of Devoid of Life. Her death destroyed him mentally and physically. He tried to spend the next 2 years finding peace, coming to terms with her death. But in all that time, he just couldn't. In Resanthum, life is not meant to be fleeting, if you live a good life in the eyes of The Golden Phoenix it's said that they shall resurrect you and allow you to live forever. Love should not be confined to the bounds of a single lifetime, and all should be granted the gift of resurrection.
Over the course of the following year he studied every page of Neveah's spellbooks and journals to try and find any way he could to bring her back. He eventually came across mentions of a terribly powerful devil, the archdevil of souls and one of the most powerful devils to ever live called Kowathlich. Alberich pled to Kowathlich to resurrect his wife, and the two struck a deal. Kowathlich would resurrect Neveah, and in return, after 1 year together Kowathlich would come and claim Alberich's soul. Should Alberich honour the deal, Neveah will be left alive.The year is bittersweet. The two enjoyed their time together as best they could, becoming inseparable during their one year together. Neveah often made her banana bread for Alberich, his favourite dessert, knowing their time would be short as gloom hangs over them, the gloom of Kowathlich looming in the distance and getting closer each day. And as the year ended, in 853 FA Kowathlich came to claim Alberich's soul. He beckoned Al to make his final goodbyes but Alberich defied him and said he won't be giving up his soul. Kowathlich was humoured that a mortal thought he could escape his contract that easily, especially when he tried to raise a sword, a toothpick towards him. They fought but when Kowathlich grew tired of this charade he ignited Neveah in flames. She burned to death screaming in pain as Alberich watched in horror. For attempting to defy the deal, Kowathlich decided not just to take his soul, but to transform him into a tiefling of his own design bearing close resemblance to Kowathlich's own form.
Nuka Cola, "Alberich Split", 2024Alberich sat there, left to rot next to the charred remains of his wife, his world. Not knowing what else he could even do, he wandered off in a fugue state, off to explore his prison or what others would it the world.518 years later in 284 ME he found the city of Skyfrost and stayed there for a few months as his presence became known within the town. Skyfrost didn't enjoy magic users nor did it enjoy Tieflings. Alberich was about to be chased from the city when a burst of arcane energy hit the town shaking it with destructive consequence, as Kowathlch clawed his way back up from the gloom world with a small armada of devils by his side. He sought to plunge the city into the gloom and claim the souls of all those residing within so that he could become even more powerful and further his own goals of amassing more and more souls and power.Alberich did not want the city to be destroyed, this city he fell in love with, and so he decided to fight Kowathlich himself but was defeated and only barely managed to escape without being killed. Kowathlich tightened his grip on the city and began to claim the souls of those within. So Alberich set off to find ways of getting stronger so he could singlehandedly defeat Kowathlich.
He traveled 6 months on foot back to Resanthum and back to Neveah's grave to try and contact her spirit again. He had tried it thousands of times before but this time, it worked and she appeared before him. She told him the truth about Devoid of Life and how it could be used to channel souls to gain power, similar to Kowathlich's own power as the archdevil of souls.Once again, Alberich set off for 6 months on foot back towards Skyfrost. He made his return secretly and went through the city and found every citizen promising them salvation, he got them to lend him their power, their souls so that he could have the power to fight Kowathlich. When he felt enough of the strength flowing through him, he went to Kowathlich at the heart of the city and challenged him to a duel again. Kowathlich laughed but accepted and the two battled. They did not sleep, they only fought for the next 2 weeks with no rest. Even with all this power Alberich was still losing, Kowathlich was still more powerful than Alberich powered by a city of souls. So Alberich channeled all the souls he had claimed as all the citizens of Skyfrost died one by one so he could strike down Kowathlich, but even then he didn't have the strength. So he made a binding vow, a forbidden art of magic even in circles that practice magic more liberally. He used the power of the souls and sealed Kowathlich within his own body, within his own mind. He burned all the souls inside his body, even the last embers of his own that Kowathlich had left him with him so he wouldn't be too suicidal, and Kowathlch became the only soul, the only spirit in his body. As Kowathlich became bound within Alberich's body, he was impressed with the cunning to be able to defeat him, to subjugate him in this way as the two viciously made out within the mindscape.With Kowathlch sealed in his own mind and nearly the entire population of Skyfrost killed, Alberich walked through the ghost town. There were few survivors of the carnage, but Alberich found a girl not more than 6 years old crying next to her dead family because Alberich had borrowed then spent their souls earlier. He looked at her as she cried and cursed at him and he killed her. Then he left the dead city.He returned to Neveah's spirit and she said that it was time for her to rest, and depart for the afterlife as she was a spirit without worship, and she had persisted for too long. Alberich reflected in this moment, seeing himself not the same as he once was. He had changed, he had become The Eternal Sinner bound to walk Mytharia forever more. Neveah said that she was only the reflection of his past now and he can't let go but he has to. The rain poured down on them and they sat together and he cried as he knew he was the only one who could keep her memory alive. He would continue to chase his dream of being with her, but he knew that it was nigh impossible. She won't come back to life, and he cannot pass into the afterlife without a soul.Alberich stared at his own reflection in the water, disgusted by his own visage and he danced with the spirit of his wife Neveah as she disappeared and faded into the afterlife.So Alberich The Eternal Sinner swore that he would one day reunite with her, no matter what it takes. (The above is adapted from the store written by Honkai Syd, 2024.)In the wake of Skyfrost, racism against tieflings becomes far worse because of the death caused by the tiefling Alberich and the devils he fought. So much death as he wandered the world, just adding to the stereotype of devils and tieflings being murderers and stealers of souls for their own gain. Many communities in the outer reaches of Faiftexl began to burn tiefling children again after a brief recession at the beginning of the Age of Memories with the higher rate of tiefling births and the global mass deaths.
During the age of memories, in 1017 ME, Alberich wandered to and lived in Greenest City for a time. on 25/11/1017 ME, Alberich met The Outsiders, a recently formed group of adventurers who at the time were searching for a way to cure the cancer of a member of their party. Alberich ended up going shopping with them in town and becoming acquainted with them.
Alberich was watching the Greenest Day Parade which celebrated the founding of Greenest and all its various exports when the 25/11/1017 ME terrorist attack happened. Alberich was among the adventurers and guards who fought against the cultists who sought to cause chaos for reasons that remain unknown as all the cultists who were caught killed themselves. Once the battle was over he threw his axe right next to DOOR's head with a message before leaving for the night.
The next day, Alberich was then present when DOOR and Spider-Volt fought in the streets of the city, and further when the original Spider-Volt confronted his imposter for all the murders he had committed back in Rextaulia, stating that he planned to take the imposter to prison. He became more occupied however when he saw and recognized Alberich standing just a few feet away from him.
The original Spider-Volt was taken aback to see such a prolific criminal and one who was responsible for the deaths of thousands of innocent people over the last thousand years. He was forced to shift his focus towards the bigger threat, towards Alberich instead and demanded Alberich come along quietly to prison. Alberich refused, attempting to say that he had been to prison many times but they always rotted around him and that he would outlast any prison he was put into. As the original Spider-Volt argued with him, Alberich repeated his talking points several times, and went on to say that he was cursed and that was the reason for those deaths, and that part of the curse was his disgusting appearance. The assertation that his appearance of being a tiefling, was disgusting, angered Spider-Volt deeply as he pointed to DOOR and asked Alberich if he was saying that thing child was a disgusting monster for being born a tiefling. Alberich did not respond. As Spider-Volt was getting ready to take away two of The Outsiders party members, they acted quickly and cast a suggestion onto Spider-Volt that he leave. The gambit bought them the time they needed as The Outsiders, joined now by Alberich, absconded into the forests outside the city to head into a remnant ruin that hadn't been disturbed since The Saviours of Greenest were there before The Planaclysm.
Alberich remained outside with Raziel and the newborn Fence while The Outsiders raided the dungeon. When they returned after the delve, DOOR decided he wanted to fuck with Alberich. So after hearing many many stories of Alberich and his deceased wife, Neveah, DOOR decided to conjure an illusion of Alberich's wife returned from the dead and having made him a fresh pan of banana bread so excited to see him and be with him again. Alberich was destroyed, he was excited but also he couldn't believe what he was seeing, he never thought he would see her again as he cried at her return. Then DOOR dropped the illusion, and showed that it was all a lie saying that his wife was dead and she was never coming back.
This is known as The Banana Bread Incident. In this moment Alberich was so wracked with emotions and his mental state was completely and utterly obliterated. In this moment Kowathlich found the opportunity to take control and have some fun. He partially manifested through Alberich's body, the snapped off horns grew to full size, Alberich himself grew in height and the eyes glowed with a sinister energy when Kowathlich took the reigns of the body. Kowathlich toyed with them, he didn't bring out his famous scythe of souls, nor did he open his sanctum of will. Even the great archangel of gambling Raziel was but a pawn in his game. The Outsiders were however, a bit more impressive than Kowathlich imagined. He was just about to get serious and attempt to manifest more of his power through his sanctum of will so he could claim all their souls when Cresie Beilar ran at him with her halbert burning bright with all the radiant energy she could muster, having prayed to all the luffistic deities to grant her strength in this moment. Cresie stabbed Kowathlich aiming for the heart as the adamantine plate shattered under the weight of the divine and ricocheted her halbert through Alberich's arm but still burning his chest with the proximity as she sent Kowathlich back into Alberich's mind.
The Outsiders stood barely standing and covered horrified in their blood from the battle. Alberich laid on the ground his arm separate as Cal MeowMeow broke off one of his horns while his body was still weak. Alberich passed out in a pool of clear blood as The Outsiders realised Kowathlich could have killed them if he wasn't playing with them. They couldn't deal with him if that happened again. They casted sending on Spider-Volt and told him where they were and to come pick up Alberich. When he arrived he saw them all still covered in blood while the party hid the imposter, saying that he had fried himself to death because he wasn't immune to his own lightning. Spider-Volt thanked them for calling him and said he was glad they were ok and that he was impressed that they managed to survive kowathlich. He collected Alberich who swore that the prison would rot around him and he would one day be wandering the world again, and Spider-Volt swung away after signing DOOR's door.When Spider-Volt returned to Renexann, he placed Alberich in his hidden prison where all his villains are kept at the highest security. He placed Alberich in The Archivist's Cube where he couldn't harm anyone else for as long as he remained inside.Alberich's only definitively known goal is to find a way to reunite with his wife Neveah, whether that be for her to be resurrected and live again, or for him to find a way to regain his soul and pass into the afterlife and see her again, whether she's in The Gloom World, or The Bright World. Attaining a new soul however is nigh impossible without the intervention of gods since his was destroyed after the events in Skyfrost. Resurrection of Neveah is also impossible as history states that her soul doesn't wish to return to life, she wanted him to move on from her when her soul passed into the afterlife and for her to return would keep Alberich stuck in the past.
Neveah Ichas was Alberich's wife before her death due to her use of Devoid of Life. The two had a very loving relationship in life but parts of it were marred in gloom, especially during her year of return. Alberich loves his wife, perhaps too much. He's hung up on her even a thousand years after her death. However, this is in line with the culture Alberich and Neveah grew up in and lived in for most of their mortal lives. They grew up in Resanthum, the country of resurrection, and of immortal love. Resanthian culture believes that people should always return to life in some form or another, and that true love transcends lifetimes. Neveah requested Alberich move on from her and to move on from the past, but he has denied that wish in favour of trying to find a way to return to her.Kowathlich and Alberich have a complicated relationship that in some circles would be described as a kismesissitude. Alberich holds deep hatred for Kowathlich for taking his soul and for killing Neveah. But he's also deeply attracted to him because of the depths of this hatred. Kowathlich is entertained by Alberich and his boldness to defy and even fight him time and time again, and then of course to subjugate him inside his own body. Because of this their unholy attraction to one another is mutual, but through hatred rather than any form of love or affection. Over the last 800 years they've been bound together, the two have grown close but the disdain has remained even so while an amount of care has blossomed because Alberich would die to animaleipis if Kowathlich were to be destroyed or leave his body. There have even been cases where they worked together toward common goals and then consummated their hatred within the mindscape.Alberich has a complex relationship with his father. There was disdain between them for many years due to Alberich's love for his witch wife, then things seemed to be better when Neveah healed him, but it didn't really bring them back together. They didn't see each other many times before his death in 907 FA, and Alberich visited him one final time on his death bed.The Outsiders and Alberich only met for a brief time, but from that brief time The Outsiders hold great contempt for Alberich. They see him as a man stuck in the past, and an evil villain who thinks he's the tragic martyr of the story. Cal wishes that Alberich could be free of Kowathlich, move on and live a normal life away from his evil wife, but Cal also wants to kill him. Cresie and DOOR also want the old man dead and Cresie regrets not dealing a finishing blow when she had the chance, even if he would have reformed a few years later, but not accepting that he would.From his travels and his time in Rascatine, Alberich managed to obtain a full suit of pure adamantine plate armour that would fetch hundreds of thousands of gold with the right wealthy buyers. This armour is near impervious to harm and can absorb particularly fierce blows into becoming like any other strike.

item.title: Alberich Portrait
Old Alberich Portrait
Alberich Split
Human Alberich
Oukruh
item.description:
Infobox
Oukruh, The Psionic Sunburst, is a powerful saiyan superhero residing within Fulmin. As a young child he was inspired by The Volteyan Avengers to become a hero and protect people so he could get stronger and face tougher threats and live up to his potential. He does this to prove his worth and to prove he is good enough. He's currently in a situationship with his best friend Duel-Lilah, just seeing her as his best friend and not thinking about it veyr much because he's very passive.Oukruh is a kindhearted saiyan who fights to protect people because he wants to make his power matter. He believes that anyone with power should be helping people but is passive to peoples free will. Oukruh avidly listens to music because he enjoys the vibrations and how it interacts with his powers and makes him feel.
In relationships, Oukruh is a bit naive and very oblivious towards the feelings of others as well as his own, due in part to head trauma he received trying to learn to use his powers. He sees Duel-Lilah as his best friend he can never be separated from, and that he wants to be with forever. He's very prideful in his saiyan abilities and heritage, and he's always focused on getting stronger to focus on protecting people more. He then views his psionic powers as an extension of his will, and as a gift. He thinks that they are a boon to allow him to help people. His view on his sexuality is that he doesn't see himself as a part of the gay community, but he aplauds their achievements and thinks homophobia is wrong. He knows he's attracted to men and women but he doesn't think about it very much because he needs to save people and puts others above himself. He thinks that he's not good enough but by saving people he can prove his worth.
When Oukruh was 4 years old his psionic powers manifested before his saiyan powers and he made a rock explode. His father, seeing him manifest these weird power, seemingly instead of his normal ones, called him a freak of nature. His father tried to turn him into the Volteyan government because of this dangerous power but his mother talked him down from doing so. Eventually his normal powers also manifested and he was very proud that they did.
Oukruh grew up in Fulmin and when he was 10 years old he watched the members of the Volteyan Avengers do Volt 9/11 and seeing these brave heroes try to destroy The Thundercloud to protect people from the heinous Volt King inspired him to want to do the same. He began his heroing career when he was 13 and he told his parents. When he did they encouraged him because it meant he would fight and get stronger.
Oukruh met Duel-Lilah in a class in their freshman year of high school. Oukruh did aggressively mediocre in school but Duel-Lilah did extremely well so they started talking one day when Oukruh asked to cheat off her homework. But then on the first test where they did that Duel-Lilah happened to get every single question wrong so they failed together and got chastised by the teacher after for their horrible scores. After that they started hanging out and studying together, rather than cheating off each other so that this wouldn't happen again. Master his super saiyan abilities

item.title: Soulscorching
item.description: Soulscorching is the process by which a creature died by overexerting their soul or the magic therein. Upon a creature's death in this way, they typically rise as a malevolent spirit called a BLANK. This is paricularly common among Illuminants whose primary cause of death is via the overexertion of their magic burning out their body.These spirits become malformed representations of the creature they once were using the magic from their body. This in turn makes the Soulscorched Spirits of Illuminants particularly deadly.Once someone has been transformed into a soulscorched spirit they cannot be cured except by a wish spell, and they cannot be resurrected except by the wish spell.

item.title: Astrology
item.description:
Astrological beliefs are common across Mytharia, and there are some commonly agreed upon beliefs about the astrology of where and when people are born. Most of these beliefs don't necessarily have bearing to them based on actual scientific or magical evidence, but the superstitions and beliefs are still there with the arguments arising over whether they lie true or not.Astrology over ones birthday and the month they are born is common, as people are believed to have certain traits they may be associated with, or that the god who presides over that month may be looking over them. Troll especially have strong ties to their beliefs in astrology as they most often do become bound to their calendar in some way or another. As they are highly insectoid, they often resemble the insects tied to the month they are hatched in.
Fieldrenary as the start of the year is a time of new beginnings. The Time Keeper is said to decree prophecies of destruction in what is to follow in the year to come. The morpho butterfly flaps its wings as consequences are laid out of what came before, and what is to come. Those born in this month are said to be determined individuals set to make change in the world around them, however they can also be seen as manipulators you can be wary of. The Time Keeper often gifts those born in her holy month with the greatest magic of all, the potential of chronomancy. A magic to be feared, and a magic to be awed.
With determination, Kamâmel is the time to step forward and protect those around you from what is to come. The Woman of Heart guides this month. Prophecies are not infallible, and sometimes you must trust the snake to protect you, and let the light of the lucina butterfly guide you. Those born in Kamâmel are often seen as selfless and marked with the possibility to become heroes. They are often seen as those who will do great good at the cost of their own happiness for the love of those around them. It's even said that when they lose their path, that their intentions will stay true and find it again.
Mystrath is the month of knowledge that must be protected, and the month of the arcane. Magic can protect, and magic permeates this month and is seen as the best time to cast the biggest spells. The Lady of Arcana protects and lords over the magic of the world, and those born within it are said to be gifted with powerful sparks like the glow of fireflies, as well as being studious and knowledgeable like the owls that watch over this month. However, it is also often seen that Mystrath-born abuse this knowledge as the chaotic and powerful magic corrupts them to unleash it for their own ends.
The leftover magic that permeated Mystrath fades into the dreams of Dremfel as the most visions and prophecies are seen in this holy month of The Daydreamer. Divination is at its most powerful as it's gently guided by the flight of luna moths. Those born within the month of Dremfel are seen as ambitious and destined to go through much change as their dreams guide them forward, so that they may command the same respect and admiration as a tiger.
The power of dreams wane as Jimuary is the time of misfortune and plans gone awry. The Dear Leader is to be heeded in this month and it's often said that burning art in the name of The Dear Leader can ward off the misfortune said to occur in this month. Autonomy like a red panda is prided by The Dear Leader so that misfortune does not befall you while his death's head hawkmoths watch over. Those born within this month are seen as going one of two ways, they may either live long and fruitful lives off the exploits of others, or they may be destined to die young for their art and forgotten to history.
With the month of misfortune coming to a close, Lucifrox becomes the month of temptation. It is known to be marred with pain and suffering, however it's just as summer begins and so too do new opportunities. The False Sufferer watches over those born in this month, guiding them like rams, or in some case like sheep. Those born in Lucifrox are similar to those born in Dremfel, often set towards lofty goals, however those born in Lucifrox often die achieving theirs. Lucifrox-born are often martyrs and are seen as becoming leaders. But they live fast, and die young trying to get things done before they burn out and die like cicadas.
Solas is the month of renewal. The days are at their longest and life begins again here when the land is at its most fertile. This is the month of Twilow, The Hearthmother, the month to spend time with friends and family, to buzz with your community like bumblebees, to build and sow your future. Those born in Solas are said to become pillars of their community or heads of their families. This is also a month of fertility where healing can occur, where you can regenerate like a salamander what has been lost, and where the children of the future are conceived.
The month of Quarrels and Quarries. As the land basks in the renewal of Solas, nature is renewed and so too are rivalries and game. Quarren is seen as the month to settle scores, to hunt those who've wronged you, to seek glory in the hunt of monsters or to renew your coffers of food. Your time to act is now. Quarren-born are said to be often gifted with natural instinct to find things and people, and that they are often highly perceptive. Worshippers of The Shadowhunter say that to be born in his holy month of Quarren is a gift that they might stalk the shadows, strike like a scorpion, then gather what is needed like a squirrel.
A month of creation. Taking the spoils of what you have gathered and fashioning them into something new. Owlen is seen as the month to take the time and craft, to create art, whether you're working with a brush, in a smith, or in a kitchen. Owlen-born are said to be gifted artists and crafters, smiled upon by Tyrus, The Ether Crafter himself. Born with the adaptability and courage of the moose, as well as the craving for sweets and liquor of the ambrosia beetle.
Rumbleth is named for the god of famine and chaos, The Muffin Lord. It's seen as a month of strife where insecurity and misfortune could strike at any time, so you must persevere through chaos and grasp what you can. Be free like a cat, and stay tough like a rhinoceros beetle. Those born during Rumbleth are said to be destined to be tough and hardy, and to be independent so they can stand on their own, and find their own path during the chaos that follows their lives.
Primus follows uncertainly from Rumbleth and is seen as the month to take your fate into your own hands. To take the risks that make your future and to roll the dice of your life in the light of day. The Master of Luck may guide your fate as you take gamble what it may become. Those born in this month are said to be the luckiest as The Master of Luck takes a special interest in where their fates may lead. Some however also say that Lunas is the holy month of the god Lune, but that is highly debated between followers of The Master of Luck and The Golden Phoenix. The luck of the sparrow guides those under The Master of Luck's interest, and their holy crickets place bets on where the dice will fall.
The power of gods wanes as the height of winter comes close. Oktober is a month of what lurks in darkness, a month of the occult and a month of the forbidden. The Curate of The Occult watches over this month as their wolves, their bats, and their spiders watch all that occurs. They encourage laws to be broken and let the occult and the supernatural run unbound. Oktober is seen as a month of high risk and high reward when dealing with magic you're unfamiliar with, it could have disastrous consequences, or lead to unbound power. Oktober-born are seen as those who push the boundaries of what is possible, destined for glory or destruction, power or annihilation. Occult magic rings especially powerful as wolves howl at the full moon in this month, and bats fly from unseen crypts. Power wants to be used, and spiders whisper in the ears to lead those born in this month towards it.
The year comes to its close, the power of gods wanes before the new year begins, and it is said that The Golden Phoenix leaves his post guarding the gates of resurrection so he may guide the souls of the dead to their final resting places. Lunas is a time of mourning, and a time of remembering. What has been lost to the ashes of time, can be reborn in new forms like a phoenix. Change is inevitable, so like dragonflies you must allow yourself to transform and to hope for the future. Those born in Lunas are seen as those full of hope, and those who can adapt to the future, and those who are destined to go through many changes and transformations in their life.

item.title: Coletta D. Coolington
item.description: Infobox Coletta D. Coolington was a vampire hunter in the Coolington family some centuries ago. She's said to have had a girlfriend who was a princess with pink hair from a far off kingdom and she wielded a powerful greatsword. Known lore on Coletta ends when her sister was turned into an evil vampire, and Coletta became known under the alias "The Gentleman Prince".

item.title: B-Head
item.description: Infobox Backup Heads, known also as B-Heads, are a rare item invested in and manufactured primarily in Rextaulia. These heads are made to function as backup heads for the soon to be deceased containing a large diamond at their core that houses the soul once its inhabitant installs it. The heads are heavily enchanted and forged with arcane materials to be resistant to wear and tear, and to emulate most of the senses the recently deceased had in their previous head.B-Heads come in a variety of levels of prestige with the manufacturers selling off any failed tests as bargain versions that may be missing key features on their luxury lines.

item.title: Lazulain
item.description: Infobox “z_Assets/Misc/ImagePlaceholder.png” could not be found. Lazulain is an underwater country between The Divergent Isles and Faiftexl. They foxus on the export of magical objects created by mages raised in the lower class as workers while the upper class of noble houses typically marry members of the lower class into their ranks seeing it as an act of benevolence.Primary focus is sharks and Remora

item.title: Forsythia Mythralight
item.description:
Infobox
Art by Powolfmon Warren Mythralight Viktor Mythralight
Forythia Mythralight is an ancient vampiric wizard and the progenitor of all vampires. She has been sighted many times since she left wider society after her turn into a Vampire, but her goals and whereabouts since The Planaclysm and the fall of Dougleton.
What is known of her current day is that she travels with her husband Rhodri Mythralight but not with her children.
Before she became a vampire, she was the head of house Mythralightfrom 1,052 FA to 2 ME. She rebuilt it from the brink of destruction in the wake of her fathers death and became the arcane advisor to the at the time king Robril Starsteel before she left it behind to found Greenest City. Her leaving that position for such a strange reason was shocking at the time, but it became clear later that she had done so for the express purpose of the ritual which transformed her and her family into the first vampires.Forsythia is a haughty noble. Though she is not truly part of a noble house anymore, she still acts like the peak of nobility which is likely due in part to her arrogance at knowing that she is one of the most powerful beings in Mytharia and there is nary a chance that anyone should have the ability to kill her.Forsythia is an embodiment of arrogance and belief that she is better and more powerful than others. She is petty but also lazy and depending on the scale of the sleight, she is sometimes impressed when people have the courage to even attempt to cause her issue. She is also often lazy and unwanting to deal with anyone who does any small happenstance inconvenience to her. But if you cause her enough of a headache she will stop at nothing to wipe you from the face of history no matter where you go.Forsythia grew up in the noble circles of Dougstar and Dougleton during the Age of Adventure. The first age after the fall of the empires of scale and flower where the world was a frontier to explore again.The Mythralight family throughout all of history has been known for its powerful magical bloodline and the perpetual rumour that the first Mythralight was a daughter of The Lady of Arcana herself. As such, Forsythia has trained in and studied magic for all her life and by the time she was an adult was already a highly accomplished wizard.Though she became a highly accomplished wizard, Forsythia was born into House Mythralight during its lowest point when it was on the brink of collapse. When she was 24, on the 5th of Mystrath, 1,052 FA, her father Eduardo Mythralight died of pnemonia, leaving her as the new head of the house. Historians have since theorised that she may have caused the pnemonia which killed him but there is no clear evidence for this. Her mother still lived and advised her but was ignored until 12 years later when she died in 1,064 FA.She spent the next three decades of her life rebuilding House Mythralight from the ashes it had nearly fallen to. The first major step toward rebuilding the house was her landing the job as King Robril Starsteel's Arcane Advisor in 1,053 FA. In this single move she gained a considerable amount of power and funds which only grew as she continued acting in her position and developing powerful magic items and spells while she advised the king on all things magical within Dougleton.On the 6th of Solas, 1,053 FA she would marry Rhodri Roderick Roddenheim who would take her name due to her house's higher status than his.
As she continued in her position, she also went on to expand house Mythralight by having three children. Her firstborn child Viktor Mythralight was born on the 22nd of Owlen 1,055 Fa. She attempted to train him in the arcane arts, but was continually busy with her job as the arcane advisor causing her to spend little time with him in his childhood.
Her second child, Gwendolyn Mythalight would be born on the 27th of Fieldrenary, 1,058 FA. Forsythia put a high degree of care into the conception and birth of Gwendolyn so she would be born in a place of power and on a full moon of Vamperum. Forsythia actually put a great degree of care into Gwendolyn's childhood, attempting to raise her into a powerful wizard like herself, smothering her with incredible amounts of training and studying.Her third and final child was born on the 5th of Owlen, 1,062 FA. Warren was ignored most of his childhood and eventually sent away to Dawnforge to learn combat skills.
Throughout her time as King Robril Starsteel's Arcane Advisor, she developed over a dozen spells and created hundreds, possibly thousands of magic items. But eventually she rather suddenly packed it all up and left to found Greenest, taking only her husband and children with her as they organised a caravan to settle the area.
Shortly after arrival in Greenest she employed the adventuring party who would later be known as The Saviours of Greenest to gather for her various materials used in the ritual to turn herself and her family into vampires. Gwendolyn Mythalight had not been informed of the ritual and didn't wish to die to complete it, so a confrontation occurred between the two groups, with The Saviours of Greenest successfully saving Gwendolyn from the ritual. The purpose unknown to them, they buried The Mythralights after their suicide to later discover they'd risen from the graves.
Forsythia had another skirmish with the group after kidnapping her daughter back from the group who had saved her. During this time she cut off Gwendolyn's hands to prevent her from casting magic, intending to later turn her into a Vampire alongside the rest of them. The Saviours of Greenest however managed to drive back Forsythia who was forced to retreat due to temporarily losing her magic after turning.
It is unclear what happened in the time succeeding these events. There have been scarce sightings of her over the last thousand years. Some believe she is involved with Titan Blood trade in 2. Mytharia/Planets/Mytharia Planet/Vortil/Rextaulia/Rextaulia, but there is little to substantitate this claim.

item.title: cascade
Volteya Overview
item.description: Volteya is a world built in fan fiction tropes. It features plot contrivances, omegaverse, and others all for the sake of its main themingThe Main Theme of Volteya is to show what things could be like if you made the smallest changes. The person you could have become if you'd had different people in your life, or if the world had been different enough to make you someone else.Volteya is a modern setting meant to be reminiscent of the early 2010s featuring all the trappings of the like such as phones and other modern technology. There's parodies present of real world things and the setting is meant to be vaguely North American so it feels almost like a splinter of the real world, mixed in with worldbuilding from Mytharia. People can still be born lucent or aphotic here but don't possess visual differences as such. Vampires Werewolves, and Witches are all common as factions with tension between one another to play on the tropes of the supernatural present.The setting itself is ruled by a god king known only as The Volt King. He is vaguely known to have reached apotheosis 2000 years ago and stunted the development of technology to keep it at this modern level. When he reached apotheosis in his first display of divine power he either accidentally or intentionally sundered what was one continent into two.The setting features other lands beyond Volteya but their actual depiction isn't relevant to the story at hand other than as the setpiece that Volteya is a powerhungry nation ruled by a tyrant that wants to expand beyond his current domain, that he wants to expand to other parts of this planet through an endless war that keeps the citizens in fear and also placated by the notion of their military protecting them.The Volt King has emissaries of his power, people he bestows with sparks of his power or artifacts he has created as his peacekeepers and his soldiers. The Bear King, Volt Action, and others each have something from him to flex their divine authority on behalf of god.Volteya is a theocracy, they worship their god as their ruler and their ruler as their god.

item.title: Pasted image 20250223011632
Lemon Portrait
Rextaulia
item.description: Infobox “z_Assets/Misc/ImagePlaceholder.png” could not be found. Rextaulia is based mainly in refinement. They take imports and refine them into other things before exporting them.Their primarily dealings are in potions and scrolls. Many advanced potioncrafting techniques were pioneered here, or were built on techniques from Dawnforge. Their control of these substances is very tight for fear of the population succumbing to the ill effects of more volatile ingredients or drugs, but due to this and it having so many port cities, black markets and underground trades actually thrive in Rextaulia consequently making it the easiest place to find illicit materials if you're really looking.Rextaulia is a hybrid country based both over and underground. most major cities have segmants and above and below ground with some smaller towns only being one or the other.Another thing Rextaulia is known for is, even though their lucent population is rather low, a large amount of them are anomalies, born with different unique abilities and forms of magic that can then often become hereditary
