Trading Tables from Heliana
Bègacahkos
item.description:
Infobox
Art by lucentWitch The bègacahkos are a race of humanoids resembling Mytharian hippopotamus'. Not much is known about their race due to the small number of them currently known in Mytharian record.Bègacahkos are a bipedal race resembling hippopotamus'. They most often have short limbs but large bodies with lots of mass which to outside viewers may resemble fat, but is actually pure muscle. Covering their bodies is a thin sheet of hair that grows longer on the head around the top of the skull and at the front of the snout, resembling human head and facial hair. Bègacahkos skin is typically a shade of grey or brown and is rough and flabby. This skin also secretes a form of red gel which protects them from solar radiation.Focusing more on the head, bègacahkos have small nubby ears that often perk up when excited or droop down when stressed or sad. They have wide snouts with large canine and incisor teeth in their mouths that can be exceedingly deadly with their powerful jaws.
Bègacahkos reproduce through standard sexual means, however they possess a strange dichotomy of form. In most cases they appear in their standard form, and while in this form they are consistently and constantly horny. But when exposed to the pheromones of specific plants on the surface of their homeworld, their horizontal mass grows to become vertical with them standing taller and appearing more lean. They also grow several spike-like protrusions out of their spine. While affected by these hormones they lose all libido and become more hyper-focused on scholarly matters.Bègacahkos also have a strange reaction to moonlight as it seems to charge their cells with energy, stopping the decay of sells and speeding up the generation of new cells. This grants them incredible strength, as well as immortality.The bègacahkos are a race from a far off planet that has been filled with civil war and classism. The society of the bègacahkos was divided into the wealthy elites living on the surface of the planet in lush gardens and bathing in the moonlight, with the poor living below the surface, unable to access the power granted by the light of the moon. During the planet's first civil war, they destroyed their moon and thus the power of the moon was lost as the immortals of the upper echelons were shunted back down to mortality. Overtime, the moon's power became but a legend and a myth for generations who had not experienced it to doubt if it were ever real.With the thing creating the class divide destroyed, the disparity lessened as most bègacahkos returned to the surface. At this time most took on their alpha forms but during the harsh winters would retreat into the mountains or back underground where the pheromones which caused that form would not affect them, causing most reproduction to happen in the winter months.
The bègacahkos eventually became involved in an interstellar war with the vulpalf. The vulpalf were brutal with their advanced technology. Some sects of the bègacahkos aligned themselves with the vulpalf and eventually the bègacahkos homeworld was destroyed with very few survivors managing to escape across the stars in ships which would eventually run out of life support. Those who had flipped to the side of the vulpalf were exterminated shortly after the war. The current number of living bègacahkos is unknown.Bègacahkos names are typically focused on the ideals of battles and warriors. They name their children things like Nialls, meaning warrior, Warren, Koa, and Vanqui.

item.title: Begacahkos Emperor
Forn Star family tree
Niles
The Man With No Name
item.description:
Infobox Arthur Swifteye was a bandit from town of Harisonarkansas. He grew up in a loving adopted family who took him in after he was abandoned for being a witch in Rascatine . Some believe he was related to the former royal family of Rascatine but the validity of this is unknown.
Arthur is credited as being one of The Saviours of Greenest, and one of the heroes who saved all of Mytharia from being torn apart in The Planaclysm , however in stopping the planaclysm he perished at the hands of Avanthum.
Arthur Swifteye was a bandit. He didn't care about laws but he cared about people. He cared about his friends and about saving the world, especially if there was coin involved. His main focus was always his own life and to keep driving forward in the world. Arthur believed that no matter who you lose, carrying on is the most important things. In the end however, his way of thinking must have changed as he did sacrifice himself to end The Planaclysm and kill Avanthum after achieving Apotheosis.Arthur was born in the country of Rascatine to unknown parents. Some believe they were nobles in Rascine city but this has never been confirmed.He was abandoned in the desert for being born a witch but was found and adopted by a family in Harrisonarkansas who took him in as their own along with their own son. He had to hide inside most days and eventually found family among a band of outlaws on the run, and specifically in his friend Dutch. They would go on to become wanted outlaws together prowling the deserts of Rascatine robbing banks and the established government.One day they went on a heist to steal from a museum. Arthur and Dutch each grabbed something before the guards came and chased them out of the building. They ran and ran and ran, and eventually one of the guards got Dutch with a spear as he fell to the ground. Arthur assumed him dead and kept running. Now wanted with an even higher bounty he hid out on a boat and fled to Vortil landing in Goldas before making his way to Dougstar . Here he would do odd jobs before eventually getting hired as a caravan guard by the Mythralights on their way to establish Greenest .On the way to Greenest he met Chet Alexopolus, Primula Exspiravit , and Rin . and they defended the caravan together until it made its way to the site in which Greenest would be established.Within the first week of Greenest's establishment there was a devastating werewolf attack where most of its would-be citizens died. But Arthur and his allies perservered as did the Mythralights and several others such as Ghag .After this the party began looking for ways to defend themselves and the town for when the next full moon arrived. This began with delving into a Remnant ruin. They found multiple useful items, but were attacked by robotic birds which killed Arthur. After his death Rin burned his body in a pile of potatoes with a prayer to The Muffin King to resurrect him. It did not work but Forsythia Mythralight took notice of this and had him resurrected to aid her in plans she was undertaking.Arthur along with his party began doing several missions for Forsythia, one of them supposedly involving a Troll . Another saw him and a party member alledgedly having met the goddess Twilow, The Hearth Mother and lying successfully lying to her.Once they had gathered what was needed it is unknown what exactly ocurred that night other than a mass suicide of some kind.Arthur and his associates did more adventuring for some time until one day bounty hunters began coming after Arthur. One of these hunters being Xomus Sunbreath, a former associate of Arthur during his outlaw days in Rascatine. Xomus let slip that Dutch was alive before Arthur put a bullet in their head. From there the group went for a boat immediatly and sailed out to Rascatine. Arthur managed to save Dutch who had lost an arm and a leg, but ironically Arthur lost an arm himself in his battle with the king.Upon their return to Vortil, The Planaclysm began as the Dragons arrived to invade Mytharia led by Avanthum .Arthur and his gang defended Greenest from a green dragon whom they killed and a blue dragon that they scarred and scared away. After this Arthur recieved a letter from Chet asking for aid in defending Molbrut . They did not give Chet aid and he fell with Molbrut. There were bigger fish to fry as Plavoth was sundered from Vortil and Avanthum landed and scorched Plavoth along with the energy of The Blazenfields.A final confrontation occurred between Arthur and his allies against Avanthum. It is believed that Arthur achieved Apotheosis during this battle but died in killing Avanthum.
item.guid: Cross Planar Lore/Worship/Dead Gods/The Man With No Name.md

item.title: Arthur_Swifteye
Forsythia Portrait
The Planaclysm
item.description: The planaclysm occurred at the end of The Age of Adventure when a group of the titans began a plan to expand their territory into Mytherium. The first real contact between planes was made during this age and it was shortly thereafter Dragons attempted to invade and all the shifting and holes made through the planes caused them to collapse inward and for sections of them to merge inward to Mytherium. What sections didn’t merge are believed to have been destroyed during the planaclysm and many hundreds of thousands died during the ensuing battles between mortals and titans.
